id: Talking to the Moon Bruno Mars
folderName: Talking to the Moon Bruno Mars
setting: Two friends catching up over coffee on a quiet afternoon.

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Lately, I feel like I've gone a bit mad.
sentences.displayHtml: Lately, I feel like I've gone a bit mad.

conversation.japanese: ねえ、クロエ。最近、ちょっとおかしくなっちゃった気がするんだ。

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.japanese: え、どうしたの、レオ？なんでそんなこと言うの？ちょっと元気ないみたいだけど。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Well, my neighbors think I'm crazy because...
sentences.displayHtml: Well, my neighbors think I'm crazy because...

sentences.text: at night, when the stars light up my room, I just sit by myself, talking to the Moon.
sentences.displayHtml: at night, when the stars light up my room, I just sit by myself, talking to the Moon.

conversation.japanese: えっとね、近所の人たちは僕のことをクレイジーだと思ってるんだ… 夜、星が僕の部屋を照らすと、僕はただ一人で座って、月に話しかけてるんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: you're still missing her so much, aren't you?
sentences.displayHtml: you're still missing her so much, aren't you?

sentences.text: What do you hope for when you talk to the moon?
sentences.displayHtml: What do you hope for when you talk to the moon?

conversation.japanese: ああ、レオ…まだ彼女のこと、すごく恋しいんだね？月に話しかけるとき、何を願ってるの？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I just hope she's on the other side talking to me too.
sentences.displayHtml: I just hope she's on the other side talking to me too.

sentences.text: Sometimes I wonder, am I just a fool who sits alone?
sentences.displayHtml: Sometimes I wonder, am I just a fool who sits alone?

conversation.japanese: ただ、彼女も向こう側で僕に話しかけてるんじゃないかって願ってるんだ。時々、僕はただ一人で座ってる馬鹿者なのかなって思うよ。
